description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
A Zoox vehicle (Vehicle 1), operating in manual mode, was traveling southbound on Florida St near the intersection with Division St in San 
Francisco. The Zoox vehicle slowed to a stop to allow an oncoming box truck (Vehicle 2), attempting to turn left, to clear when the box 
truck made contact with the driver's side rear camera housing on the Zoox vehicle. There were no reported injuries and the police were not 
called.
Print
Clear Form
